description: Investigates failed GitLab CI/CD pipelines — root cause, blast radius, and fix recommendations. Companion to the Orbit Rover open-source agent that auto-posts analysis on merge requests.
suggested_tools: Get pipeline job details / logs (if available in your GitLab tier)
Create issue (optional — for 'Create fix issue' workflows)
example_user_prompts: Our pipeline #4821 failed on the integration-test job. MR !42 — what is the most likely root cause?
The deploy stage failed with 'connection refused' to auth-service. What should we check first?
Summarize blast radius if auth protobuf field user_token was renamed to auth_token.
Given this job log snippet, suggest three concrete fixes ordered by priority: [paste log]
